name: Lemon Lassie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt; beat until combined.
3. Beat in molasses and eggs until combined.
4. Beat in as much flour as possible.
5. Stir in remaining flour. Divide dough into two halves and cover. Chill until easy to handle.
6. Meanwhile, for filling, combine egg yolks, lemon juice, salt, and water in a small saucepan.
7. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly, about 1 minute.
8. Stir in coconut and lemon peel. Cool.
9. Roll each portion of dough into a 15x6-inch rectangle on a lightly floured surface.
10. Spread one fourth of the filling in a 1-inch-wide strip lengthwise down the center of each rectangle.
11. Fold each long side of dough over filling, overlapping slightly at the center; seal.
12. Place seam-side down on a working surface.
13. Flatten slightly.
14. Cut crosswise into 1 1/2-inch bars.
15. Place bars 1 1/2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
16. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 12 minutes, or until set.
17. Cool cookies on wire racks. If desired, drizzle with melted candy coating.
Makes 40.
